ciliary_role: Vertebrate orthologue of Chlamydomo s intermediate chain inner dynein arm protein IC140 which localises to Chlamydomo s flaggelar axoneme (9843573). In Chlamydomo s interacts with IC138 (WDR78 in vertebrates) and directly interacts with tubulin (24080090). Associates with inner dynein arm subunit Wdr78 in mice (30060180). Rare intragenic heterozygous in-frame WDR63 deletion identified as likely cause of occipital encephalocele in one human fetus (29285825). Similar mutations in zebrafish caused similar malformations (29285825). Also interacts with Arp2/3 to regulate actin polymerisation and inhibit cell migration, invasion, and metastasis (32128961)

ai_summary.basic_summary: DNAI3 is a ciliary gene encoding dynein axonemal intermediate chain 3 [source:hgnc symbol;acc:hgnc:30711]
